socketserver/ThreadingMixIn/daemon_threa.name: daemon_threads
socketserver/ThreadingMixIn/daemon_threa.description: For ThreadingMixIn use daemonic threads by setting ThreadingMixIn.daemon_threads to True to not wait until threads complete.

info.excerpt: For ThreadingMixIn use daemonic threads by setting ThreadingMixIn.daemon_threads to True to not wait until threads complete.
